nasb.text: And they buried him in the territory of his inheritance in Timnath-serah, which is in the hill country of Ephraim, on the north of Mount Gaash.

esv.text: And they buried him in his own inheritance at Timnath-serah, which is in the hill country of Ephraim, north of the mountain of Gaash.

cnv.text: 以色列人把他埋葬在他自己地業的境內，就是在以法蓮山地上的亭拿．西拉，在迦實山的北邊。

ccb.text: 以色列人把他葬在他的土地上，就是在迦实山北边、以法莲山区的亭拿·西拉。
